title: GemelNet Advisor — Israeli Pension Funds
description: Query and analyze Israeli provident, study (קרן השתלמות) and investment-provident (גמל להשקעה) funds via the official GemelNet open dataset. Compare funds, rank one against its like-for-like peers, scan a statement into a portfolio checkup, and estimate shekel revenue — public fund-level data only, framed as data-grounded analysis, not financial advice. Ships with a UserPromptSubmit hook that auto-triggers on Hebrew/English fund keywords.
